news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences Ltd gets USFDA EIR post PAI conducted Nov 4-13, 2025.
Approval granted for new isolator injectable line at Ahmedabad SEZ1 facility.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences Ltd gets USFDA EIR post PAI conducted Nov 4-13, 2025.
Approval granted for new isolator injectable line at Ahmedabad SEZ1 facility.

news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences gets EIR and USFDA nod for oncology facility in Ahmedabad SEZ1.
Approval follows inspection held from Nov 4-13, 2025 at the injectable facility.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences gets EIR and USFDA nod for oncology facility in Ahmedabad SEZ1.
Approval follows inspection held from Nov 4-13, 2025 at the injectable facility.

news.title:
NTPC expands capacity to 89,128 MW, signs nuclear MoU with EDF; KEC International secures orders worth ₹2,518 crore.
Lupin, Zydus gain USFDA nod for diabetes drugs; Bosch plans to acquire Bosch Chassis Systems India to boost mobility offerings.
news.summary:
NTPC expands capacity to 89,128 MW, signs nuclear MoU with EDF; KEC International secures orders worth ₹2,518 crore.
Lupin, Zydus gain USFDA nod for diabetes drugs; Bosch plans to acquire Bosch Chassis Systems India to boost mobility offerings.

news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences gets USFDA approval for Dapagliflozin tablets.
Drug targets type 2 diabetes; eligible for 180-day shared exclusivity in US.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences gets USFDA approval for Dapagliflozin tablets.
Drug targets type 2 diabetes; eligible for 180-day shared exclusivity in US.

news.title: Zydus Lifesciences announces a reduction in GST demand.
news.summary: Zydus Lifesciences announces a reduction in GST demand.

news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences fell 3.6% to Rs.864.25, underperforming Sensex's 0.3% decline.
Bearish momentum and rising open interest signal caution for this mid-cap pharma stock.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences fell 3.6% to Rs.864.25, underperforming Sensex's 0.3% decline.
Bearish momentum and rising open interest signal caution for this mid-cap pharma stock.

news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences received a tax demand order of Rs 14.2M for FY19-24.
The issue involves alleged reversal of inadmissible ITC; company plans to appeal.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences received a tax demand order of Rs 14.2M for FY19-24.
The issue involves alleged reversal of inadmissible ITC; company plans to appeal.

news.title:
UBS highlights intense competition in generic GLP-1, impacting pharma stocks.
UBS rates Sun Pharma 'Buy', Cipla & Aurobindo 'Neutral', Dr Reddy’s, Lupin, Zydus 'Sell'.
news.summary:
UBS highlights intense competition in generic GLP-1, impacting pharma stocks.
UBS rates Sun Pharma 'Buy', Cipla & Aurobindo 'Neutral', Dr Reddy’s, Lupin, Zydus 'Sell'.

news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences launches Semaglutide injection via reusable multi-dose pen.
Approval targets Type 2 Diabetes, Obesity; pen improves convenience, flexibility, and reduces costs.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences launches Semaglutide injection via reusable multi-dose pen.
Approval targets Type 2 Diabetes, Obesity; pen improves convenience, flexibility, and reduces costs.

news.title:
Zydus and Lupin sign licensing deal for Semaglutide Injection in India.
Lupin pays fees to Zydus; partnership targets diabetes, weight management therapies.
news.summary:
Zydus and Lupin sign licensing deal for Semaglutide Injection in India.
Lupin pays fees to Zydus; partnership targets diabetes, weight management therapies.

news.title:
Zydus licenses Progerinin for Hutchinson Gilford Progeria Syndrome (HGPS).
Phase 2A trial data for the drug expected by mid-2026.
news.summary:
Zydus licenses Progerinin for Hutchinson Gilford Progeria Syndrome (HGPS).
Phase 2A trial data for the drug expected by mid-2026.

news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences gains approval in China for Desidustat tablets targeting CKD-related renal anaemia.
Drug licensed exclusively to China Medical System Holdings for over 120M CKD patients in China.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences gains approval in China for Desidustat tablets targeting CKD-related renal anaemia.
Drug licensed exclusively to China Medical System Holdings for over 120M CKD patients in China.

news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences gets USFDA nod for Cevimeline Hydrochloride Capsules 30mg, treating dry mouth in Sjögren's syndrome.
The drug, with global annual sales of $26.9M, will be manufactured at Ahmedabad facility.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences gets USFDA nod for Cevimeline Hydrochloride Capsules 30mg, treating dry mouth in Sjögren's syndrome.
The drug, with global annual sales of $26.9M, will be manufactured at Ahmedabad facility.

news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences gains USFDA approval for Ivermectin 3 mg and Dapsone tablets.
Ivermectin has $14.8M annual US sales; Dapsone records $8.4M sales.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences gains USFDA approval for Ivermectin 3 mg and Dapsone tablets.
Ivermectin has $14.8M annual US sales; Dapsone records $8.4M sales.

news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences develops Pembrolizumab biosimilar FYB206 showing bioequivalence to Keytruda.
The company plans to file for approval with the USFDA based on positive data.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences develops Pembrolizumab biosimilar FYB206 showing bioequivalence to Keytruda.
The company plans to file for approval with the USFDA based on positive data.

news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences to launch generic semaglutide injection post Ozempic patent expiry, approved by DCGI.
Stock rose 1.7% intraday; up 4% in 5 days, 5.7% YoY. USFDA approved Bosentan tablets/suspension.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences to launch generic semaglutide injection post Ozempic patent expiry, approved by DCGI.
Stock rose 1.7% intraday; up 4% in 5 days, 5.7% YoY. USFDA approved Bosentan tablets/suspension.

news.title:
Zydus plans Day 1 launch of Semaglutide injection post-patent expiry in India.
Drug for Type 2 Diabetes, Obesity features reusable pen for better adherence.
news.summary:
Zydus plans Day 1 launch of Semaglutide injection post-patent expiry in India.
Drug for Type 2 Diabetes, Obesity features reusable pen for better adherence.

news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences' Ahmedabad unit cleared USFDA inspection with zero observations, boosting regulatory credibility.
Zydus also gained USFDA approval for bosentan tablets and launched ANYRA for eye care; shares down 1.5% YTD at ₹901.35.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences' Ahmedabad unit cleared USFDA inspection with zero observations, boosting regulatory credibility.
Zydus also gained USFDA approval for bosentan tablets and launched ANYRA for eye care; shares down 1.5% YTD at ₹901.35.

news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences' Ahmedabad injectable facility cleared by USFDA inspection.
No issues were reported by USFDA during the inspection.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences' Ahmedabad injectable facility cleared by USFDA inspection.
No issues were reported by USFDA during the inspection.

news.title:
Zydus Lifesciences launches India's first Aflibercept 2mg Anyra™ biosimilar for diabetic retinopathy and AMD.
Partnerships with Regeneron and Bayer aim to improve access to affordable biologics.
news.summary:
Zydus Lifesciences launches India's first Aflibercept 2mg Anyra™ biosimilar for diabetic retinopathy and AMD.
Partnerships with Regeneron and Bayer aim to improve access to affordable biologics.
